title: Arboreal Ripening Grove: legacy backlog batch 12 dispositioned
body: Closed claim a53d0d6e after processing legacy backlog batch 12 in place. Dispositions: 1 duplicate, 4 owner-gated. Duplicate: validation-strategy topology is already owned by the validation-and-tdd doctrine restructure plan. Owner gates: reviewer doctrine-carrier PDR promotion, reviewer recipe forcing-function promotion, git index-lock wait-loop conflict between owner-facing surfaces and commit skill, and session-close housekeeping promotion/watch/withdraw decision. Verification: targeted markdownlint pass, git diff --check pass, practice:fitness:strict-hard SOFT with 20 soft, 22 healthy, 8 ready-empty, hard 0, critical 0. Continuity updated with batch 13 next entries. No archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
